background: The freeware program StaTable can determine exact probabilities for t-random variables. You can also use WinPepi WhatIs.exe or Microsoft Excel's TDIST function for this purpose.

task.query: Use one of these software applications to find Pr(T_8 ≥ 2.65)
task.method: 事件发生概率及独立性

task.query: Use one of these software applications to find Pr(T_8 ≥ 2.98)
task.method: 事件发生概率及独立性

task.query: Use one of these software applications to find Pr(T_{19} ≤ 2.98)
task.method: 事件发生概率及独立性
